case "teardown":

	case "generate":
		return h.handleGenerate(base, req), false
	case "shutdown":
		return h.handleShutdown(base), true
	default:
		base.Status = "error"
		base.Code = ErrInvalidRequest
		base.Message = fmt.Sprintf("unknown command: %s", req.Command)
		return base, false
	}
}

content.text: Let me search for the Go teardown handler more specifically:

content.content: 466:func (h *Handler) handleTeardown(resp Response, req Request) Response {

case "setup":
		return h.handleSetup(base, req), false
	case "teardown":
		return h.handleTeardown(base, req), false
	case "generate":
		return h.handleGenerate(base, req), false
	case "shutdown":
		return h.handleShutdown(base), true
	default:
		base.Status = "error"
		base.Code = ErrInvalidRequest
		base.Message = fmt.Sprintf("unknown command: %s", req.Command)
		return base, false
	}
}

func (h *Handler) handleHandshake(resp Response, req Request) Response {
	resp.Status = "handshake"
	resp.FrontendVersion = frontendVersion
	resp.Language = frontendLanguage
	caps := make([]string, len(CommandCapabilities))
	copy(caps, CommandCapabilities)
	caps = append(caps,
		"complex_type:date", "complex_type:duration", "complex_type:url",
		"complex_type:reg_exp", "complex_type:ip_address", "complex_type:big_int",
		"complex_type:rational", "complex_type:big_decimal", "complex_type:error",
	)
	resp.Capabilities = caps
	return resp
}

func (h *Handler) handleAnalyze(resp Response, req Request) Response {
	if req.File == "" {
		resp.Status = "error"
		resp.Code = ErrInvalidRequest
		resp.Message = "analyze command requires a file path"
		return resp
	}

	if _, err := os.Stat(req.File); err != nil {
		resp.Status = "error"
		resp.Code = ErrFileNotFound
		resp.Message = fmt.Sprintf("file not found: %s", req.File)
		return resp
	}

	h.lastAnalyzedFile = req.File

	var functionName string
	if req.Function != nil {
		functionName = *req.Function
	}

	functions, err := AnalyzeFile(req.File, functionName)
	if err != nil {
		if functionName != "" && isNotFound(err) {
			resp.Status = "error"
			resp.Code = "function_not_found"
			resp.Message = fmt.Sprintf("function %q not found in %s", functionName, req.File)
			return resp
		}
		resp.Status = "error"
		resp.Code = ErrParseError
		resp.Message = err.Error()
		return resp
	}

	resp.Status = "analyze"
	if functions == nil {
		functions = []FunctionAnalysis{}
	}

content.content:
1→# Frontend Feature Parity Matrix
     2→
     3→Implementation status of protocol features across Shatter's three language frontends.
     4→
     5→**Legend:** Y = implemented | N = not implemented | P = partial | S = stub (command accepted, returns "not yet implemented")
     6→
     7→Last updated: 2026-03-03
     8→
     9→## Protocol Commands
    10→
    11→| Command | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    12→|---------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    13→| handshake | Y | Y | Y | All return capabilities list |
    14→| analyze | Y | Y | Y | Branch detection, type inference, literals |
    15→| instrument | Y | Y | Y | Source-to-source with branch/constraint tracking |
    16→| execute | Y | Y | S | Rust returns "not yet implemented" |
    17→| setup | Y | Y | S | Rust returns "not yet implemented" |
    18→| teardown | Y | Y | S | Rust returns "not yet implemented" |
    19→| generate | Y | Y | S | Rust returns "not yet implemented" |
    20→| shutdown | Y | Y | Y | |
    21→
    22→## Execution Features
    23→
    24→| Feature | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    25→|---------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    26→| Function execution | Y | Y | N | Go uses subprocess harness; TS uses vm.runInContext |
    27→| SHATTER_EXEC_TIMEOUT | Y | Y | Y | TS default 15s, Go default 5s, Rust default 5s (stored, not applied yet) |
    28→| Performance metrics | Y | Y | N | wall_time_ms, setup_time_ms |
    29→| Mock support | Y | Y | N | Symbol-level function mocking with return values |
    30→| Setup/teardown lifecycle | Y | Y | N | Per-function and per-execution modes |
    31→
    32→## Side-Effect Capture
    33→
    34→| Side Effect | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    35→|-------------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    36→| Console output | Y | N | N | TS proxies console.log/warn/error/info/debug |
    37→| process.stdout.write | N | N | N | TS only captures console methods, not raw stdout |
    38→| File I/O | N | N | N | Not captured in any frontend |
    39→| Network calls | N | N | N | Not captured in any frontend |
    40→| Environment variable access | N | N | N | Not captured in any frontend |
    41→| Global mutation | N | N | N | Not captured in any frontend |
    42→| Thrown errors | Y | P | N | TS captures in thrown_error + side_effects; Go captures in thrown_error only |
    43→| Global state changes | N | N | N | Not captured in any frontend |
    44→
    45→## Analysis Features
    46→
    47→| Feature | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    48→|---------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    49→| Branch detection | Y | Y | Y | if/else, switch/match, loops |
    50→| Type inference | Y | Y | Y | Parameter and return types |
    51→| Literal extraction | Y | Y | Y | String, number, bool literals from source |
    52→| Symbolic constraint reporting | Y | Y | N | TS and Go extract symbolic expressions from branches |
    53→| Call graph / dependency extraction | Y | Y | Y | Function-level call dependencies |
    54→| Generator support | Y | Y | N | Custom input generators from setup |
    55→
    56→## Instrumentation Features
    57→
    58→| Feature | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    59→|---------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    60→| Branch recording | Y | Y | Y | Inserts recording calls at branch points |
    61→| Constraint JSON embedding | Y | Y | Y | Symbolic constraints serialized into instrumented source |
    62→| Source map / line tracking | Y | Y | Y | Original line numbers preserved |
    63→
    64→## Configuration
    65→
    66→| Feature | TypeScript | Go | Rust | Notes |
    67→|---------|-----------|-----|------|-------|
    68→| Truncation policy | N | N | N | Planned (str-ebtz) |
    69→| Memory limits | N | N | N | Planned (str-9x76): --max-old-space-size for TS, GOMEMLIMIT for Go |
    70→| Log level control | Y | Y | Y | SHATTER_LOG_LEVEL env var |
    71→
